name: New Potatoes, Onions and Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 cup fresh tomatoes, peeled and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the onions and cook until they are lightly browned.
2. Add the bacon to the skillet and cook for 5 minutes, breaking up any larger pieces with a wooden spoon.
3. Stir in the beef broth and tomatoes. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer until the potatoes are just tender, about 15 minutes.
4. Remove from heat, sprinkle with parsley, salt, and pepper. Serve.
Yields 4 to 6 servings.
